DFIntGetProductInfoGamepassCacheSecs_Pla.mechanism: Sets a time limit for how long gamepass information is stored before refreshing.
DFIntGetProductInfoGamepassCacheSecs_Pla.purpose: Ensures players see up-to-date gamepass information without delays.

FFlagFixWarningLocaleIAP_Staged.mechanism: Addresses issues with warning messages related to in-app purchases based on locale.
FFlagFixWarningLocaleIAP_Staged.purpose: Provides clearer and more accurate warnings for players making purchases.

FFlagVideoCaptureIxpEnabled_IXP.mechanism: Enables a feature for capturing video within the game environment.
FFlagVideoCaptureIxpEnabled_IXP.purpose: Allows players to record their gameplay for sharing or review.

FFlagEnableBackgroundCheckV2_Staged.mechanism: Implements a new version of background checks for user safety.
FFlagEnableBackgroundCheckV2_Staged.purpose: Enhances player safety by improving the vetting process for interactions.

FFlagVoiceChatClientRebootOperationEnabl.mechanism: Enables a feature that allows the voice chat system to restart without needing to close the game.
FFlagVoiceChatClientRebootOperationEnabl.purpose: Improves the reliability of voice chat, making it easier for players to communicate without interruptions.
